2605.25939.title: From Latent Space to Training Data: Explainable Specialization in Minimal MLPs
2605.25939.paper_summary: We here study whether training biases can make hidden neurons specialize in minimal one-hidden-layer MLPs, and whether such specialization improves prototype-based reconstruction of the training dataset from the learned weights. We consider Gaussianactivation MLPs of width equal to dataset size and compare three structural losses that respectively encourage coverage of the training samples, separation between neuron-induced prototypes, and low overlap of hidden responses, against the standard fitting baseline. Experiments on uniformly sampled one-dimensional datasets show a stable pattern from N = 3 to N = 100 across 480 controlled runs. Coverage regularization gives the lowest mean reconstruction error at every tested size and raises the prototype-usage specialization ratio relative to the standard baseline, while separation has mixed effects and overlap penalties are systematically harmful. We show that the harm is not an optimization failure: overlap-active approaches fit the data as well as overlap-free ones but route the optimizer to a degenerate equilibrium in which prototype centers are pushed outside the convex hull of the training inputs. Coverage cannot reward this expulsion and acts as an attractor: separation admits it only at large temperature and overlap admits it at the nominal hyperparameter choice. A direct τ-sweep on the separation-only mask and a prototype-position visualization at N = 100 confirm the mechanism. The findings yield a simple design principle for prototype-recoverability-aware training: every repulsive structural loss must be compensated by a compatible attractor, or it will collapse the latent geometry it was meant to refine.
2605.25939.paper_summary_zh: 我們在此研究訓練偏差是否能使隱藏神經元在最小的一層隱藏層 MLP 中專門化，以及這種專門化是否能改善從學習到的權重中對訓練數據集的原型基礎重建。我們考慮寬度等於數據集大小的高斯激活 MLP，並比較三種結構損失，這些損失分別鼓勵對訓練樣本的覆蓋、神經元誘導原型之間的分離，以及隱藏響應的低重疊，與標準擬合基準進行對比。在均勻抽樣的一維數據集上的實驗顯示，從 N = 3 到 N = 100 的 480 次受控運行中出現穩定的模式。覆蓋正則化在每個測試大小下都給出了最低的平均重建誤差，並提高了相對於標準基準的原型使用專門化比例，而分離的效果混合，重疊懲罰則系統性地有害。我們顯示這種危害並不是優化失敗：重疊活躍的方法對數據的擬合與無重疊的方法一樣好，但將優化器引導到一個退化的平衡狀態，在該狀態下，原型中心被推到訓練輸入的凸包之外。覆蓋無法獎勵這種驅逐，並作為一個吸引子運作：分離僅在高溫下允許這種情況，而重疊則在名義超參數選擇下允許。對僅分離掩碼的直接 τ 掃描和在 N = 100 時的原型位置可視化確認了這一機制。這些發現為考慮原型可恢復性的訓練提供了一個簡單的設計原則：每一個排斥的結構損失必須由一個兼容的吸引子來補償，否則它將崩潰其原本旨在精煉的潛在幾何結構。
2605.25939.author: Enrique Alba et.al.
